rules.condition: If peripheral dots and globules are asymmetric or form peripheral clustering with at least three distinct colors...
If the lesion exhibits an irregular border AND an asymmetric distribution of globules and dots without a blue-white veil or other specific features of different lesions...
If blue-gray peppering is observed alongside an irregular border and multiple distinct colors without other specific features (e.g., no blue-white veil, no milia-like cysts)...
If an irregular border and 3 or more distinct colors are observed, with absence of the blue-white veil and vascular structures...
If there is an absence of specific features (globules, regression areas, and vascular patterns) while still presenting an irregular border with multiple colors...
If the lesion has an irregular border with a mixture of brown, pink, and light purple colors without exhibiting specific features like vascular structures or globules...
If [asymmetric peripheral dots and globules] and [3 or more distinct colors] and [border notching] are observed...

If [absence of blue-white veil] and [absence of specific features of Benign Keratosis, Basal Cell Carcinoma, Actinic Keratosis, Vascular Lesion, and Dermatofibroma] are observed, in conjunction with other Melanoma-specific features...
If [3 or more distinct colors] and [asymmetric peripheral dots and globules] are observed with a pigmentation range including brown and darker pigmentation with areas of lighter pigmentation...
If a lesion presents with a single uniform brown color and lacks pigment network, regression structures, vascular structures, and other specific dermoscopic features...
If the lesion is devoid of blue-white veil, specific features for keratosis, AC, basal cell carcinoma, vascular lesions, and dermatofibroma, and has an uncertain border...
rules.action: Consider Melanocytic Nevus as a high probability

rules.condition: If a lesion shows an absence of globules, dots, regression structures, vascular structures, as well as distinct keratotic, acanthotic, or vascular features...
rules.action: Opt for Melanocytic Nevus as a diagnosis

rules.condition: If the lesion presents a single uniform brown color and lacks distinct pigment network, regression structures, and other specific dermoscopic features...
If there is an absence of vascular structures such as arborizing vessels or red-purple lacunae, and the background is not erythematous...
If the lesion lacks specific keratosis or dermatofibroma features such as milia-like cysts, comedo-like openings, or central white scar, and presents a uniform pigmentation...
If the lesion displays a single uniform brown color with no specific architectural structures and lacks pigment network, regression structures, and vascular structures...

If the lesion has irregular borders but displays no other high-confidence distinguishing features such as globules, dots, blue-white veil, arborizing vessels, or specific features indicating other lesions...
rules.action: Consider Melanocytic Nevus while ruling out more distinctive lesions

rules.condition: If the lesion is characterized primarily by an amorphous central area with no significant architectural details or patterns, in addition to lack of specific dermoscopic features such as keratosis, AK, etc...
rules.action: Shall be highly suggestive of Melanocytic Nevus

rules.condition: If a lesion presents a uniformly pigmented appearance with 2 distinct shades of brown and light brown, and lacks specific dermoscopic structures such as globules, regression areas, and vascular structures, with a regular border...
If the number of distinct colors is 2 and there is a regular border without any specific features pointing towards Melanoma, Vascular Lesion, or Dermatofibroma...

If a lesion displays no distinct dermoscopic structures such as pigment network, regression structures, globules, vascular structures, and has a regular border with an uncertain presence of dots and globules distribution...
If arborizing vessels are not clearly visible and distinct with a reddish-brown background present without specific lesion features like milia-like cysts or comedo-like openings...
If a lesion exhibits arborizing vessels but lacks all other disease-specific dermoscopic features and background color is not reddish-brown...
rules.action: Consider alternative diagnoses, as it may not solely favor Basal Cell Carcinoma

rules.condition: If a lesion has a reddish-brown background with no clearly defined pigment network and lacks all specific dermatologic conditions' features except for subtle or uncertain arborizing vessels...
rules.action: Proceed with caution and further evaluation, as Benign Keratosis might be more suitable without specific confirmation of Basal Cell Carcinoma features

rules.condition: If a lesion shows a regular border with a single uniform brown color but lacks keratosis-specific features, yet high confidence indicates other benign lesions.

If a lesion displays a regular border, a single uniform brown color, and is faintly pigmented in the absence of all major dermoscopic features including vascular, regression, network, globules, and keratosis-specific features, consider closely for Benign Keratosis due to possible image resolution.
rules.action: Rule out Melanocytic Nevus and Investigate Further for Benign Keratosis

rules.condition: If a lesion presents with a predominantly pink to erythematous background and thread-like linear vessels, and lacks specific features of other lesions such as a blue-white veil, vascular structures, and other lesion-specific markers...

If a lesion has an irregular border and the absence of regression structures, blue-white veil, arborizing vessels, and other specific features while showing an erythematous background and thread-like linear vessels...

If a lesion has two distinct colors, predominantly pink/erythematous and light brown, and lacks other lesion-specific features along with the presence of an irregular border and no regression structures...
If polymorphous vascular structures are observed in the absence of a pigment network and with an erythematous background...
If the lesion has 2 distinct colors (brown and pink) with polymorphous vascular structures and no specific features of other lesions...
If there is an erythematous background with polymorphous vascular structures and no other specific lesion features are present...
If an irregular border, 3_or_more distinct colors, a blue-white veil, and erythematous background are observed, but specific BCC or other lesion features are absent...
rules.action: Consider additional tests or expert opinion for Basal Cell Carcinoma

rules.condition: If a lesion shows an erythematous background and lacks specific vascular, keratosis, or other distinctive dermoscopic structures...
rules.action: Evaluate for Basal Cell Carcinoma, especially if other overlapping features are present

rules.condition: If blue-white veil is present with no visible pigmented network, regression structures, or other lesion-specific features...
rules.action: Do not immediately classify as Melanoma; consider Basal Cell Carcinoma as a possible diagnosis

rules.condition: If erythematous background and the absence of specific Krtosis and AK features are observed, yet there is a blue-white veil over a raised area...
If a diffuse structureless pattern with shades of pink and red is paired with the absence of regression structures and specific Basal Cell, Vascular, or Dermatofibroma features...

If the lesion displays a blue-white veil over a raised area and the absence of peripheral dots and globules, as well as the absence of specific features for BCC, keratosis, AK, vascular lesions, and dermatofibroma...
If arborizing vessels are observed with an erythematous background andno other specific features are present...
rules.action: Ruled out Basal Cell Carcinoma, consider Actinic Keratosis or other keratosis-specific conditions

rules.condition: If the lesion exhibits an erythematous background with minimal color variation (2 distinct colors) and lacks a pigment network or regression structures...
rules.action: Consider Actinic Keratosis, rule out Melanoma or Melanocytic Nevus

rules.condition: If arborizing vessels are observed in combination with keratosis-specific features absent, but other malignancy-specific features are ruled out...
rules.action: Consider Actinic Keratosis and rule out Basal Cell Carcinoma unless bcc-specific features are strongly indicated

rules.condition: If an atypical pigment network is observed with 'absent' regression structures and 'absent' vascular structures, and the lesion has 3 or more distinct colors...
rules.action: Consider Actinic Keratosis as a potential diagnosis, especially in the absence of other specific melanoma features such as a blue-white veil.

rules.condition: If a lesion exhibits an irregular border but lacks specific features like leaf-like structures, blue-gray ovoid nests, and arborizing vessels, particularly when vascular structures are absent...
rules.action: Prioritize Actinic Keratosis over Melanoma in the differential diagnosis.

rules.condition: If a lesion shows peripheral dots and globules with asymmetric distribution but no additional specific melanoma features such as blue-white veil or arborizing vessels...
rules.action: Do not immediately rule out Actinic Keratosis, even in the presence of other atypical features.

rules.condition: If a lesion displays a uniform purplish color with no distinct dermoscopic structures other than a possible subtle variation in shade...
If a lesion has a single distinct color and lacks vascular structures, regression structures, and specific features of other lesions but displays a uniform purplish color...
If a lesion shows a clearly pink/erythematous background with a central erythematous base and no other specific dermoscopic features...
If a lesion has an erythematous background and no signs of vascular patterns,-containing features, pigmented network or regression structures...
If a lesion is characterized by a strawberry pattern observed in conjunction with a regular border and a single dominant color with no specific features associated with other diagnoses...
If red_purple_lacunae are present and the lesion has a sharply demarcated round/oval shape...
If the lesion has a single dominant red/purple color with an erythematous background and no pigment network or vascular structures are observed...
If vascular_lesion_specific_features are present and there is an absence of regression structures, blue-white veil, and other lesion-specific features...

If the lesion has an irregular border and lacks specific dermoscopic features like globules, dots, vascular patterns, and regression structures, but also lacks a blue-white veil and other specific features of different lesions...
rules.action: Consider Dermatofibroma as a potential diagnosis

rules.condition: If the lesion shows a mix of brown and pinkish hues with no distinct dermoscopic structures like globules, dots, or vascular patterns, and the number of distinct colors is only two...
rules.action: Consider Dermatofibroma as a potential diagnosis

rules.condition: If a lesion has an irregular border and lacks specific dermoscopic structures, including globules, dots, or vascular patterns, with two distinct colors (brownish-pink)...
If a lesion shows an absence of all specific feature markers (like globules, regression structures, and vascular structures) but has an irregular border and two distinct colors...
If a lesion exhibits a central darker area with notching along the border and a pinkish background, but lacks specific vascular, pigment network, or regression structures...
If a lesion has a pinkish background and notching along the border, but lacks specific features such as vascular structures, pigment network, or regression structures...
If a lesion shows notching along the border and a pinkish background, but lacks specific features for vascular lesions, pigment network, or regression structures...
If irregular borders and color variation with two distinct colors are observed, and no specific features for Basal Cell Carcinoma, Actinic Keratosis, Vascular Lesion, or Dermatofibroma are present...
If there is an absence of blue-white veil, vascular structures, and specific features for keratosis, actinic keratosis, vascular lesions, and dermatofibroma, but irregular borders are present...
If the lesion shows an irregular border and color variation with two distinct colors, and no peripheral dots or globules are observed...
If an irregular border is observed with a mix of brown and reddish-pink colors and no specific dermoscopic structures like globules, dots, or vascular patterns are visible...
rules.action: Consider Melanoma as a high priority

rules.condition: If color variation is present with at least two distinct colors and there is an absence of regression structures, blue-white veil, and specific vascular structures...
If the lesion exhibits an irregular border and lacks specific features such as globules, dots, vascular patterns, and regression structures, but has a mix of brown and reddish-pink colors...
rules.action: Re-evaluate for Melanoma, especially if other high-confidence features are absent

rules.condition: If color variation with 3 or more distinct colors is observed and no specific dermoscopic structures such as pigment network, globules, vascular patterns, regression structures, or lesion-specific features are present...
If the lesion shows a mix of brown, tan, and reddish hues with scattered darker areas and no blue-white veil or vascular structures are observed...
If a lesion has a regular border, a single uniform color, and lacks any specific dermoscopic features (pigment network, regression structures, vascular structures, etc.)...
If a lesion is characterized by an absence of regression structures, vascular structures, and all other lesion-specific features with no significant variation in coloration...
If a lesion exhibits a homogenous brown area without any significant pigmentation patterns, globules, or vascular indicators and a highly regular border...
If a lesion exhibits a single color with high confidence and lacks visible specific dermoscopic structures such as globules, dots, vascular patterns, and regression structures...

If a lesion has an irregular border but lacks other specific dermoscopic features and shows no blue-white veil, vascular structures, and specific features for keratosis, actinic keratosis, vascular lesions, and dermatofibroma...

If a lesion lacks specific features like milia-like cysts, comedo-like openings, strawberry pattern, erythematous background, central white scar, red-purple lacunae, and other lesion-specific patterns...
rules.action: Consider Melanocytic Nevus instead of other specific lesions

rules.condition: If the lesion appears structureless with uniform brown/grey coloration and no clear dermoscopic features...
If there is a single color variation (brown/grey) with no regression structures, blue-white veil, vascular structures, or specific features of other lesions...
If the lesion lacks specific dermoscopic features such as globules, dots, vascular patterns, or symmetry variations, and has a uniform coloration...
If arborizing vessels are absent and the lesion lacks specific features of Basal Cell Carcinoma, Benign Keratosis, Actinic Keratosis, Vascular Lesion, and Dermatofibroma...
rules.action: Consider Melanocytic Nevus or Melanoma as potential classifications

rules.condition: If the lesion displays a hypo-pigmented or depigmented area with no specific vascular, keratotic, or pigmented network structures...
rules.action: Classify as Benign Keratosis if other specific features of Basal Cell Carcinoma, Actinic Keratosis, Vascular Lesion, and Dermatofibroma are absent

rules.condition: If a lesion has a regular border, a single uniform brown color, and lacks distinct dermoscopic features such as pigment network, regression structures, vascular structures, and specific features of other lesions...
rules.action: Consider Benign Keratosis as a potential diagnosis

rules.condition: If a lesion appears as a small, uniform brown spot with no distinct dermoscopic features visible and lacks specific features of other lesions...
If the lesion shows an irregular border, dotted vascular structures, and an erythematous background with unstructured brown pigmentation...
If dotted vascular structures are present along with color variation involving two colors and an irregular border...

If there are no specific features indicating Melanoma, Vascular Lesion, Actinic Keratosis, or Benign Keratosis, but an irregular border with two color variations and dotted vascular structures are observed...
If polymorphous vascular structures and an irregular border are observed with no specific features for Basal Cell Carcinoma (such as arborizing vessels or milia-like cysts)...
rules.action: Reconsider other diagnoses even if Melanoma features like color variation are present

rules.condition: If an erythematous background is clearly observed with polymorphous vascular structures...
rules.action: Classify as Benign Keratosis or Actinic Keratosis

rules.condition: If no specific features for Basal Cell Carcinoma, Actinic Keratosis, or other lesions are observed but polymorphous vascular structures are present...
rules.action: Do not classify as Melanoma without additional supporting features such as asymmetric pigment network or other structural asymmetry.

rules.condition: If the lesion shows an erythematous background with irregular borders, and no specific dermoscopic structures like pigment network, globules, or vascular patterns are clearly visible...
If the lesion presents irregular borders and 3 or more colors but lacks specific features of other lesion types (keratosis, actinic keratosis, etc.), and has an erythematous background...
rules.action: Rethink the diagnosis and prioritize Basal Cell Carcinoma over Melanoma

rules.condition: If the lesion displays multiple colors without distinct dermoscopic features such as pigment network, globules, or vascular patterns, consider the presence of an erythematous background as a potential indicator of Basal Cell Carcinoma...

If a lesion exhibits a clearly pink/erythematous background without other dermoscopic features and has an absence of Actinic Keratosis-specific features (keratosis-specific features are none or uncertain_not_visible) observed...
If a lesion has a clearly pink/erythematous background but no other specific dermoscopic features, except that it either has Actinic Keratosis-specific features (non-absent) observed...

If a lesion has an absence of keratosis-specific features but exhibits additional dermoscopic features such as globules_and_dots_distribution, vascular_structures (non-absent, non-uncertain_not_visible) in the presence of erythematous_background...
rules.action: Do not classify as Actinic Keratosis or Vascular Lesion without further evidence

rules.condition: If [polymorphous vascular structures] are observed in conjunction with a [clearly pink/erythematous background]...
rules.action: Re-evaluate for [Actinic Keratosis features] before classifying as Vascular Lesion

rules.condition: If [Actinic Keratosis-specific features] are uncertain or not visible but the lesion has a [faint cobblestone-like pattern]...
rules.action: Consider [Actinic Keratosis] as a likely candidate over Vascular Lesion

rules.condition: If [high-confidence] polymorphous vascular structures are present but other [Actinic Keratosis-specific features] are absent...
rules.action: Look for subtle dermoscopic hints like a faint cobblestone-like pattern to reinforce Actinic Keratosis suspicion
